title: Ethnic Advocacy Groups * African American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Ethnic Advocacy Groups * African American Community 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community Hispanic/Latino Community Muslim Community Somali Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND ADVOCACY AND CIVIC ENGAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Works to advance the organization’s social policy agenda to create institutional change in areas that most deeply affect African Americans, communities of color, and others. Urban League of Portland works with state legislature, executive branch and city councils, school boards, and county commissions to identify policy change opportunities. Conducts policy research and writing, develops issue campaigns and messaging, mobilizes constituencies and coalitions, and works with coalition partners as well as decision-makers. 3934 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 280-2600 Get Directions Visit Website More Details URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND ADVOCACY AND CIVIC ENGAGEMENT
